title: [3.13] gh-121016: Add test for PYTHON_BASIC_REPL envioronment variable (GH-121017)
author: devdanzin
body:
This PR adds a test for `PYTHON_BASIC_REPL` setting the interpreter to use the basic REPL, using a technique suggested by @AlexWaygood on Discord.

(cherry picked from commit https://github.com/python/cpython/commit/9e45fd9858a059950f7387b4fda2b00df0e8e537)

Co-authored-by: devdanzin <74280297+devdanzin@users.noreply.github.com>

<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-121016 -->
* Issue: gh-121016
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->
